description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a light stone exterior. The front features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a balcony with a blue glass railing, providing a contemporary look. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a spacious outdoor area with a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and umbrellas for shade. Several small trees line the perimeter, adding greenery and privacy. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and a solid stone finish. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor living, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a balcony, and a fenced outdoor area featuring a swimming pool and sun loungers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, balcony, pool, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid stone wall and minimal window openings, showing the fence and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the pool, patio furniture, umbrellas, and the back facade with smaller windows.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the large glass windows, balcony, pool area, and outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, no porch, and direct access from the fenced yard, flanked by large glass panels.
